name: Alla dejtar alla
overview: Bisexuals meet in search of love. In a luxury house outside Marbella, they get the chance to date each other 24/7. Here, the attraction takes unexpected and hot turns when everyone can fall for everyone. Cameras capture everything from shy glances to passionate crushes. But with drama, parties and difficult choices, the journey of love is anything but simple. Who will find the right one and who will leave the villa alone? Host: Amie Bramme Sey.
